name: AI Image
description: Full-bleed AI-generated image. Style presets, multi-line prompt rotation by day-bucket, time-of-day placeholders, e-ink-friendly suffix. The Fal.ai key + per-call usage tracking come from AI Core, so all generations show up in the AI Core admin page. Heir to the legacy fal_image widget.

cell_options.name: prompt
cell_options.label: Prompt
cell_options.default: a serene mountain landscape at golden hour, oil painting style
cell_options.placeholder: e.g. a cyberpunk tokyo street, rainy night
cell_options.help: What to generate. Placeholders: {time_of_day}, {day_of_week}, {date}, {month}, {season}, {hour}, {year}, {moon_phase}. One prompt per line rotates by bucket (Mon = line 1, Tue = line 2, etc.).

cell_options.name: style
cell_options.label: Style preset
cell_options.help: Prepended to the prompt before sending.

choices.label: Recraft V3 (~$0.04, crisp lines + readable text)

cell_options.name: image_width
cell_options.label: Fal request width (px)
cell_options.help: Leave empty to use the cell's actual width (rounded up to the next multiple of 64, clamped to [512, 2048]).

cell_options.name: scale
cell_options.label: Scale
cell_options.help: How to fit the generated image into the cell when the image and cell aspect ratios don't match. Fill crops; Fit letterboxes.

cell_options.name: negative_prompt
cell_options.label: Negative prompt
cell_options.help: What to avoid. Honoured by Fast SDXL + Recraft V3; ignored by Flux + Nano Banana.

cell_options.name: eink_friendly
cell_options.label: Append e-ink-friendly suffix
cell_options.help: Appends 'high contrast, limited palette, simple composition' so the image dithers cleanly to 6-colour Spectra / 1-bit panels.

cell_options.name: refresh_hours
cell_options.label: Refresh cadence
cell_options.help: Cost figures are for Flux Schnell. See AI Core admin page for actual usage.
